title: Menthol Protocol for Bleaching Aiptasia
author: Virginia Weis
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.immcc46

steps.instruction: Slowly add 1.35 mL of menthol (20 g/L) to the ASW 1 drop at a time. Stir constantly with the bubbler to prevent a surface film. Final concentration = 0.58 mM menthol solution
Leave bubblers inside the container, replace the lid, and wait for 8 hours. 08:00:00, Menthol incubation
Drain the menthol/ASW and replace with fresh ASW.
Leave the containers overnight in the dark.
Repeat for three days. go to step #1
After day 3 of menthol treatment, store Aiptasia in the dark. Note: an extra day of exposure may be necessary. See Description for more information.
